title: callitriche palustris subsp. stagnalis
intro: Callitriche palustris subsp. stagnalis, also known as Marsh Springwort or Marsh Starwort, is a subspecies of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Callitriche palustris subsp. stagnalis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
